pages.text: Papa says, “This yard is a MESS. The wind blew the rubbish in.” Mama says, “Let’s go on a litter hunt. First look for tins.” Papa says, “Wear these gloves.” Yuck!

blocks.text: Papa says, “This yard is a MESS. The wind blew the rubbish in.” Mama says, “Let’s go on a litter hunt. First look for tins.” Papa says, “Wear these gloves.” Yuck!

pages.text: We’re going on a tin hunt. We look up high and down low. We look under the bushes and against the fence.

blocks.text: We’re going on a tin hunt. We look up high and down low. We look under the bushes and against the fence.

pages.text: We’ve found red tins and green tins, rusty tins and shiny tins, clean tins and dirty tins. Yuck!

blocks.text: We’ve found red tins and green tins, rusty tins and shiny tins, clean tins and dirty tins.
Yuck!

pages.text: What must we do with all these tins? Find a bin and put them in! Now look for plastic.

blocks.text: What must we do with all these tins?
Find a bin and put them in!
Now look for plastic.

pages.text: We’re going on a plastic hunt. We look up high and down low. We look behind the chicken coop and in front of the house.

blocks.text: We’re going on a plastic hunt. We look up high and down low. We look behind the chicken coop and in front of the house.

pages.text: We’ve found milk bottles and bottle tops, shopping bags and sucker sticks, straws and broken buckets. Yuck!

blocks.text: We’ve found milk bottles and bottle tops, shopping bags and sucker sticks, straws and broken buckets.
Yuck!

pages.text: What must we do with all this plastic? Find a bin and put it in! Now look for paper.

blocks.text: What must we do with all this plastic?
Find a bin and put it in!
Now look for paper.

pages.text: We’re going on a paper hunt. We look up high and down low. We look near the water barrel and on top of the bench.

blocks.text: We’re going on a paper hunt. We look up high and down low. We look near the water barrel and on top of the bench.

pages.text: We’ve found wet paper and dry paper, cardboard boxes and newspaper, old paper plates and dirty tissues. Yuck!

blocks.text: We’ve found wet paper and dry paper, cardboard boxes and newspaper, old paper plates and dirty tissues.
Yuck!

pages.text: What must we do with all this paper? Find a bin and put it in! What else can you look for? Hmm …

blocks.text: What must we do with all this paper?
Find a bin and put it in!
What else can you look for? Hmm …

pages.text: There’s nnoo mmoorree mmeessss! Wow! This place is so clean. Thanks, litter hunters.

blocks.text: There’s nnoo mmoorree mmeessss!
Wow! This place is so clean. Thanks, litter hunters.

pages.text: Find a bin and put it in! You deserve a treat! And remember … what must you do with your litter?

blocks.text: Find a bin and put it in!
You deserve a treat! And remember … what must you do with your litter?
